execution_policy: strictly sequential; guarded correctness before timing; stop on first fault; independent health check

correctness.runtime_error: Wait timeout: 30000 ms! (the signal is not set to 66, but 65)

diagnosis.primary: The generated direct-L2 lowering has no effective software pipeline in final ISA: each WMMA is immediately dependent on four preceding global b128 loads.
diagnosis.secondary: Registers are wave-private, so the inherited eight-wave 128x128 schedule cannot retain the cross-wave operand reuse supplied by LDS.
diagnosis.resource_pressure: direct_l2 allocates 216 VGPR versus 188 for WMMA-LDS, further reducing latency-hiding headroom.
diagnosis.pipe_verdict: The raw pipe oracle is benchmark-ineligible on the current stack because its first exact guarded dispatch does not complete.
diagnosis.historical_evidence_caveat: The cited 4413 tok/s raw-hand artifact was a dirty whole-model throughput run whose own route-binding gate failed; it is not standalone full-output correctness evidence.
